Place Octopus in a 600/6" hotel pan
Hand-squeeze citrus over the octopus, add to the pan
Add all other ingredients, mix together
Cover with Canola Fryer Oil
Cover with aluminum foil, shiny side up, and crimp-seal to the pan.
Place hotel pan in a ~500°F oven with low fan.
Cook for ~1 hour and check for tenderness. Continue cooking in 15 minute intervals until ready.
Remove from the confit oil and cool on sheet trays, cutting to just legs as they are removed.
Cool in the blast chiller on sheet trays.
Portion into 2.5" rondelle or bias cuts, so that each piece is similar size in length and thickness with flat sides to sear.
Portion into 4 oz portions.
NOTE: Strain and reserve confit oil for one extra use, split half and half with fresh oil for same recipe.
